title: Pipe raw stdout to frontend; move stream-json parsing to client
description: Server currently filters/truncates agent output via makeStreamJsonParser. User wants the full stream. Remove server-side parsing, send raw bytes over SSE, add metadata frame, move parser to frontend with full fidelity (no truncation, no dropped events).
close_reason: Raw stdout piped server→client; stream-json parsed on frontend with full fidelity (thinking blocks, untruncated tool results)

title: Live reload: SSE endpoint + file watcher for issues.jsonl
description: Watch .beads/issues.jsonl for changes and push SSE events to connected clients so the UI auto-refreshes without polling
close_reason: Implemented SSE endpoint /api/events + fs.watch on .beads/issues.jsonl + EventSource subscriber in App.tsx

title: issue teste 2
description: qual a principal liguagem desse projeto? escreva nos comentarios dessa task

comments.author: arthuracrs
comments.text: A principal linguagem desse projeto é TypeScript. O frontend usa React + Vite e o backend usa Express — ambos em TypeScript.

comments.author: arthuracrs
comments.text: A principal linguagem desse projeto é **TypeScript**. O frontend usa React + Vite (arquivos .tsx/.ts em src/) e o backend usa Express (server/index.ts) — ambos em TypeScript. O diretório beads/ contém o CLI em Go, mas é uma dependência interna, não o foco do projeto beads-ui.
